login.page_description: Log in to your Wan2Fit account.
login.heading: Log in

signup.page_description: Create your free account to track your progress and never lose your data.
signup.heading: Create your account
signup.tldr_title: In short (for those who don't read the terms) 😉
signup.tldr_1: The account is free, no commitment.
signup.tldr_2: We store your email, first name, and sessions.
signup.tldr_3: We do not sell your data.
signup.tldr_4: Exercises are suggestions, not medical coaching.
signup.tldr_5: You can delete your account whenever you want.
signup.confirm_message: A confirmation link has been sent to

reset_password.heading: Forgot password
reset_password.instruction: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
reset_password.confirm_message: A reset link has been sent to

update_password.page_description: Choose a new password for your Wan2Fit account.
update_password.heading: New password
update_password.expired_message: Please submit a new reset request.

errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.generic_retry: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.timeout: The server is taking too long to respond. Please try again.
errors.connection_timeout: The connection is taking too long. Please try again.
errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.password_too_weak: Password must contain at least 8 characters with one uppercase letter, one lowercase letter, and one digit.

supabase_errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
supabase_errors.email_not_confirmed: Please confirm your email address before signing in.
supabase_errors.user_already_registered: An account already exists with this email.
supabase_errors.password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
supabase_errors.new_password_same: Your new password must be different from the old one.
supabase_errors.session_missing: Session expired. Please sign in again.
supabase_errors.email_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes.
